description:
Return a list of People associated with a Project. Includes users in the directory and reference users.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view of the resource to return (which attributes should be present in the response). Users without read permissions to Directory are limited to the normal and extended views. If a v...

parameters.name: filters[is_employee]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) where `is_employee` value is true.

parameters.name: filters[reference_users_only]
parameters.description: If true, returns only people who are reference users.

parameters.name: filters[without_reference_users]
parameters.description: If true, returns only people who are not reference users.

parameters.name: filters[include_company_people]
parameters.description: If true, returns people in the Company not just the Project. This option only works if the user has permission to create people in the project directory or permission to read from the company direc...

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns People where the search string matches the Person's name (first, last, or full), email address, mobile phone, business phone, fax number, or job title.

parameters.name: filters[connected]
parameters.description: If true, returns only people who are connected users. If false, returns only people who are not connected users.

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor IDs.

parameters.name: filters[job_title]
parameters.description: Returns only people who have the specified job title.

parameters.name: filters[country_code]
parameters.description: Returns only people who have the specified country code.

parameters.name: filters[state_code]
parameters.description: Returns only people who have the specified state code.

parameters.name: filters[trade_id]
parameters.description: Array of Trade IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Trade IDs.

parameters.name: filters[permission_template_id]
parameters.description: Array of Permission Template IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Permission Template IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return items with the specified sort
